query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN smsCampaignSent > 0 THEN 1 END) as already_texted,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN smsCampaignSent = 0 THEN 1 END) as not_texted,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN lastVisitDate >= '2025-01-01' THEN 1 END) as visited_2025,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN lastVisitDate >= '2025-01-01' AND smsCampaignSent = 0 THEN 1 END) as visited_2025_not_texted,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN lastVisitDate >= '2025-01-01' AND smsCampaignSent > 0 THEN 1 END) as visited_2025_already_texted
FROM customers;
command:

  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN smsCampaignSent > 0 THEN 1 END) as already_texted,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN smsCampaignSent = 0 THEN 1 END) as not_texted,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN lastVisitDate >= '2025-01-01' THEN 1 END) as visited_2025,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN lastVisitDate >= '2025-01-01' AND smsCampaignSent = 0 THEN 1 END) as visited_2025_not_texted,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN lastVisitDate >= '2025-01-01' AND smsCampaignSent > 0 THEN 1 END) as visited_2025_already_texted
FROM customers;
